query: isvisible.ai?: Free AI visibility audit alternative

results.title: [Research] Top 9 Free AI Search Visibility Checkers - SUSO
results.content:
#### How it works

Enter a website URL, and wait for the tool to check ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity. Note that the tool doesn’t query AI models live, and it doesn’t run any prompts. Instead, Am I Visible on AI offers a technical audit rather than a response check.

#### What you get

You will get a report available on the page almost immediately. It contains a simple visibility score, actionable recommendations, and an instant result without any obstacles.

#### What makes it stand out [...] ### 8. Am I Visible on AI: 44/100

|  |  |
 --- |
| Best for | Checking AI crawler accessibility and technical visibility. |
| Pricing | Fully free. No paid plans; no sign-up, email, account, or usage limits required. |

Am I Visible on AI is the only completely free tool on this list, with no email, sign-up, account, or usage limits required. Simply enter your website URL for an instant result. The trade-off is that it functions more as a technical accessibility audit than a true visibility checker, assessing whether your site is structured for AI platforms to crawl and index rather than whether it actually appears in AI-generated responses.

#### How it works [...] #### What makes it stand out

No other free tool touches DeepSeek, Mistral, or Llama. For brands in technical or developer-adjacent markets, where these models have meaningful adoption, Mangools is the only way to check visibility without a paid subscription. For most mainstream brands, whether Llama or Mistral mentions them is a secondary concern; but for the right audience, this is uniquely useful.

#### Limitations

The audit doesn’t feature citations, competitor comparison, and cannot be exported. Despite the broad AI model coverage, the output is fairly surface-level. The 35-prompt sample is reasonable, but it’s modelled rather than live, so the results reflect an estimated visibility position rather than real-time AI responses.

### 8. Am I Visible on AI: 44/100

results.title: Free AI Search Visibility Tools | Track & Improve AI SEO for Free
results.content:
### Final Advice: The “Human-in-the-Loop” Reality Check

While these tools are invaluable for scaling your AI visibility audits, they aren’t a total replacement for manual verification. At least once a month, you should still perform manual checks in AI platforms such as Gemini, ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity.

Tools can tell you that you are “AI visible,” but only a human can judge if the AI’s synthesis of your brand truly captures the voice and value you’ve worked so hard to build.

The era of GEO isn’t coming — it’s here. Pick one of the stacks above and run your first AI search visibility audit today. Your brand’s presence in the next generation of search depends on it.

### Questions or Comments? [...] | Peec.ai | Analytics & Reporting | High-quality percentage-based visibility snapshots and UI alerts. | Free tier is limited to initial audits/demo. |
| Otterly.ai | Competitive GEO | “Free Snapshot” report comparing citation gaps vs 3 rivals. | One-time analysis; subscription for alerts. |
| Geoptie | All-in-One GEO | Full suite of audits, rank tracking, and content checkers (Open Beta). | Currently free, but moving to paid models soon. |
| Ahrefs Brand Radar | Research Database | AWT free access to “AI Search Referral” traffic in GA style. | Prompt-level details require paid add-on. |
| Semrush AI Checker | Visibility Scoring | Domain-level “AI Visibility Score” comparison vs competitors. | Prompt tracking reserved for Pro users. | [...] ### Geoptie: The All-In-One Free Suite

Geoptie has disrupted the 2026 market by offering its entire platform for free during its open beta phase. It is currently the most comprehensive “zero cost” option available.

### Peec.ai: Percentage-Based Visibility

Peec.ai is a specialist analytics platform that treats AI search as a “visibility economy” rather than a click economy. It provides extremely high-quality data visualizations of brand presence.

### Otterly.ai

Otterly focuses on “Citation Gap Analysis.” It tells you not just if you’re mentioned, but why a competitor was cited instead of you.

### Amsive: AI Visibility Grader

Amsive provides one of the most practical technical checkers for AEO readiness. The tool is available at amivisibleonai.com.

results.title: Free AI Visibility Audit | Check Your AI Search Presence ...
results.content:
The VISIBLE™ AI Visibility Audit reveals how visible your brand is across generative search engines like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity.  
It helps you identify where you’re missing out on AI-generated recommendations, competitor mentions, and trust signals – and gives you a roadmap to fix it.

##### Q : What are the Perplexity, Gemini, and ChatGPT Visibility Trackers?

These are integrated tools within the audit that simulate brand-related prompts across top AI engines – Perplexity AI, Google Gemini, and ChatGPT.  
They test brand mentions, citation coverage, source visibility, and content trustworthiness, all benchmarked in a shareable dashboard.

##### Q: Is the AI Visibility Dashboard included in the free audit? [...] The free AI Visibility Audit includes a professionally designed PDF summary and key visibility metrics. Full dashboard access with deeper data, competitor comparisons, and prompt-level insights is available in the paid version.

##### Q: Why does AI visibility matter in 2025?

Search is shifting from Google to AI tools. If your brand isn’t visible inside ChatGPT or Perplexity answers, you’re missing out on leads, trust, and visibility, even if your SEO is strong. This audit helps you fix that gap.

##### Q : Can I use this audit even if I’m a small or early-stage brand?

Yes. The tool is built for businesses of all sizes. Many startups use it to establish early trust with AI engines and close visibility gaps before their competitors do. [...] G.

### 2. Profound

Profound focuses on enterprise AI visibility with a research-oriented approach. The platform raised $96M in Series C funding at a $1B valuation in February 2026 (Fortune), with total funding of $155M. Profound serves 700+ enterprise customers including 10% of the Fortune 500.

results.title: SE Ranking AI Visibility Tracker Alternatives (7 Best)
results.content:
## 7. Profound: Best for Enterprise Compliance and Scale

Profound was built for large organizations that need AI visibility data at depth. It covers multiple engines and conversation flows, giving enterprise teams a single command center for understanding brand presence across generative search environments.

![Profound’s enterprise dashboard with share-of-voice and answer archives]](

What separates Profound from lighter tools is its enterprise architecture. Role-based access controls, audit logs, and historical archives of AI answers with screenshots and metadata make it valuable for compliance-heavy teams. Agent Analytics reveals how AI crawlers access your site, connecting technical SEO signals with visibility outcomes. [...] ## 5. Otterly AI: Best for Brand Sentiment in AI Answers

Otterly AI goes beyond tracking whether your brand appears and analyzes how it is represented. It identifies the sentiment and framing of each mention, showing whether your brand is portrayed positively, neutrally, or negatively.

Otterly AI’s sentiment analysis dashboard with brand tone breakdown

The GEO Audit examines 25+ on-page and technical factors that influence AI visibility. Combined with competitor tracking, Otterly’s benchmarking tools show how sentiment and visibility evolve over time. You can compare brand tone and citation frequency against competitors across specific prompts and regions. [...] If you are enterprise, Profound delivers the compliance, archival, and scale infrastructure large teams require.

Whatever you pick, the important thing is to stop relying on AI visibility trackers that show you a number and leave you to figure out what to do next. The tools that connect visibility to traffic, content, and revenue are the ones that will actually compound.

Check your brand’s current AI visibility for free and see where you stand before committing to any tool.
